description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.
The world's best AI personal assistant for email. Open source app to help you reach inbox zero fast.
The mouse and trackpad utility for Mac.

Open YouTube / Video browser-extension [top~1] Enrich your experience&choice!🧰Smart features📌set&forget📌250+tweaks - Longest-standing. Join🧩us?👨‍👩‍👧‍👧  ⋮ {playback|discovery|extra player buttons|quality|codec|full tab|full screen|no distraction|shorts}
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.

NEO Emacs (WIP): GPU powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine.  Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀  Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.
Wishes in, PRs out. CLI agent that interviews you, plans the work, dispatches parallel agents in isolated worktrees, and reviews code before you see it.
A curated list of 450+ awesome open-source alternatives to proprietary SaaS. Deployment configs, self-hosting guides, and tool directory.
A free, privacy-first automatic file organizer that quietly sorts your Downloads folder from the system tray.

Persistent local memory layer for AI. ArcRift uses a Chrome extension and a native MCP server to sync context and decisions from your browser chats (Claude, ChatGPT, DeepSeek) straight to your local IDE agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf)  powered by a local SQLite knowledge graph.
regex101 for the terminal — real-time matching, 3 engines, capture groups, replace mode, syntax highlighting, plain-English explanations, undo/redo, mouse support. Written in Rust.

Marking：现代化跨平台 Markdown 编辑器 - 专业级编辑体验 + 可视化表格编辑  + 强大导出功能 | Modern cross-platform Markdown editor with professional editing, visual table editor, and powerful export | MarKing: A modern, professional cross-platform Markdown editor with stunning UI, DOCX/PDF export, and native performance.
